message:
refactor(btree,vdbe): concurrent agent changes — formatting, cursor enhancements, engine refinements

Batch of changes from concurrent agent sessions:

btree/cursor.rs (~1133 lines):
- cargo fmt reformatting of cell_pointers read_cell_pointers call sites
- Additional cursor navigation and B-tree operation enhancements
- Extended test coverage for cursor operations

vdbe/engine.rs (~580 lines):
- Extended opcode handler refinements
- Additional FusedAppendInsert bookkeeping improvements
- Code cleanup and dead code removal from concurrent optimization work

These changes were made by parallel agents and are committed here to
keep the working tree clean before push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
